headline: The Dow's Early Gains Slipped Away. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are Still at Records.
summary: The Dow's early gains slipped away on Friday. The blue-chip index was down slightly after rallying more than 300 points earlier in the session. The S&P 500 was up 0.6% and the Nasdaq was up 1%. Both hit record intraday highs and would mark closing highs if manage a gain.
